POST /v1/estimates/.description: Creates a new renovation estimate for a property with line items from the product catalog.

GET /v1/estimates/{estimateId}.description: Retrieves an estimate by ID including all line items, pricing, status, and change order history.

PATCH /v1/estimates/{estimateId}.description: Updates an estimate — modify line items, pricing, status, or other fields.

POST /v1/estimates/{estimateId}/duplicat.description: Creates a copy of an existing estimate with all line items. Duplicate starts in draft status.

parameters.estimateId: ID of the estimate to duplicate.

POST /v1/estimates/{estimateId}/reset.description: Resets an estimate back to draft status. Cleans up associated project scope items and unlinks documents.

GET /v1/follow-up-boss/contacts.description: Retrieves contacts synced from Follow Up Boss CRM.

POST /v1/follow-up-boss/contacts.summary: Sync contact to Follow Up Boss
POST /v1/follow-up-boss/contacts.description: Creates or updates a contact in Follow Up Boss CRM.

GET /v1/follow-up-boss/events.description: Retrieves events synced from Follow Up Boss.

POST /v1/homes/.description: Creates a new home record with property details and address.

GET /v1/homes/.description: Returns home records with optional filtering.

GET /v1/homes/{homeId}.description: Retrieves a home record by ID including property details and documents.

PATCH /v1/homes/{homeId}.description: Updates fields on a home record.

DELETE /v1/homes/{homeId}.description: Soft-deletes a home record — marks as deleted but retains for audit.

POST /v1/marketing-center/.description: Creates a new marketing asset (flyer, brochure, or campaign material).

GET /v1/marketing-center/.description: Returns available marketing materials with filtering by type and status.

POST /v1/media/.description: Uploads a file (photo, document, or attachment) and returns a URL. Supports image optimization and thumbnails.

GET /v1/media/.description: Returns media files with optional filtering by deal, contact, or type.

GET /v1/media/{mediaId}.description: Retrieves metadata for a single media file.

POST /v1/meetings/.description: Books a meeting between participants. Creates calendar entries and sends notifications.

POST /v1/meetings/check-available-times.description: Returns available time slots based on participant availability and calendar configuration.

POST /v1/meetings/get-meeting-link.description: Generates a shareable booking link for scheduling a meeting.

POST /v1/migrations/leads-to-contacts.description: Internal migration utility — converts legacy lead records to contact format. Admin only.

POST /v1/notifications/push.description: Sends a push notification to a specific user or group across mobile and web.

requestExample.title: Weekly Update Available
requestExample.body: A new weekly update has been posted for 123 Main St.

POST /v1/notifications/sms.description: Sends an SMS message to a user's phone number.

POST /v1/notifications/{userId}.description: Sends a notification to a specific user via their preferred channel.

POST /v1/onsite-visits/.description: Schedules a new onsite visit for a property inspection or contractor walkthrough.

GET /v1/onsite-visits/.description: Returns visits with optional filtering by deal, date range, or status.

GET /v1/onsite-visits/{visitId}.description: Retrieves a single onsite visit by ID.

PATCH /v1/onsite-visits/{visitId}.description: Updates fields on a visit (date, status, notes).

GET /v2/opportunities/.description: Returns a paginated list of all opportunities. Supports filtering by status, deal type, and assignee.

GET /v2/opportunities/admin/{adminId}.description: Returns opportunities assigned to a specific admin user.

GET /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}.description: Retrieves a single opportunity with contacts, property data, estimates, and status history.

PATCH /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}.description: Updates fields on an opportunity — stage, amount, notes, or custom properties.

DELETE /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}.description: Deletes an opportunity. Requires the associated contact ID for cleanup.

POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/a.description: Links an existing contact to an opportunity.

POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/c.description: Creates a new contact and associates it with the opportunity in one call.

POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/d.description: Removes the link between a contact and an opportunity.

GET /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/on.description: Retrieves the onsite visit for this opportunity.

POST /v2/opportunities/{opportunityId}/o.description: Schedules a new onsite visit for this opportunity's property.

POST /v1/partners/referral.description: Submits a referral from an affiliate partner, creating a new lead.

POST /v2/payments/reno/create-checkout-s.description: Creates a Stripe checkout session. Returns a URL to redirect the user to Stripe's hosted checkout.

POST /v2/payments/reno/payment-intents.description: Creates a Stripe payment intent for a one-time renovation payment.

DELETE /v2/payments/reno/remove-subscrip.description: Cancels an active Stripe subscription for the authenticated user.

GET /v2/payments/reno/user-subscription.description: Retrieves the current subscription status for the authenticated user.

POST /v2/payments/reno/webhook.description: Handles incoming Stripe webhook events. Called by Stripe, not by your application.

POST /v1/predictions/.description: Starts an async AI image generation job. Returns a job ID to poll for completion. Optionally tag the job with `reportId` (to associate the rendering with a property report) and/or `adminId` (Firebase UID of the admin user that initiated the render — used by the Renovision configurator in the admin app to filter their own jobs). Both `reportId` and `adminId` can be supplied together; when a job already exists for the given `jobId`, these fields are merged onto the existing record.

parameters.imageInput: URL of the source image to renovate.
parameters.jobId: Optional client-provided job ID. When supplied and the job already exists, the request updates the existing job (merging `reportId`/`adminId`) instead of creating a new one.
parameters.roomType: Room type for the render (for example, `kitchen`, `bathroom`, `living_room`).
parameters.reportId: Optional property report ID to associate this render with. Stored on the AI image render job document.
parameters.adminId: Optional Firebase UID of the admin user creating the render. Stored on the AI image render job document so admin-initiated jobs (for example, from the Renovision configurator) can be queried per admin.
parameters.materials: Optional materials selection (countertops, cabinets, flooring, etc.) used to drive the render.

GET /v1/predictions/{id}.description: Polls an AI prediction job. Returns generated images when complete. Poll every few seconds.

POST /v1/production/.description: Returns production deployment status and version information.

GET /v1/project-scopes/{dealId}.description: Retrieves the full project scope for a deal with all line items and completion status.

GET /v1/project-scopes/fill-from-pandado.description: Populates project scope by extracting line items from the signed PandaDoc document.

parameters.dealId: Deal ID to fill scope for.

PATCH /v1/project-scopes/update.description: Updates a single project scope item.

parameters.title: Updated title.
parameters.isInPunchList: Whether to include in punch list.
parameters.verified: Whether the item is verified complete.

POST /v1/project-scopes/remove.description: Removes scope items from a project.

GET /v2/properties/{objectType}.description: Retrieves all custom property definitions for a HubSpot object type.

GET /v2/properties/{objectType}/{propert.description: Retrieves a single property definition by name.

POST /v1/property/.description: Creates a new property record and initiates analysis. Main entry point for the property assessment flow.

parameters.rejectedReason: Reason for prior rejection, if re-creating.

GET /v1/property/{id}.description: Retrieves a property report with valuation data, condition assessment, comparables, and renovation recommendations.

POST /v1/property/search-comparable.description: Searches for comparable properties near a given address.

POST /v1/property/create-comparable.description: Manually adds a comparable to a report.

POST /v1/property/complete-report.description: Marks a report as complete and triggers final processing including PDF generation.

POST /v1/property/share/{reportId}.description: Generates a shareable link or sends an invite for a property report.

POST /v1/property/upgrade-to-v2.description: Upgrades a legacy V1 report to V2 format with enhanced analysis.

POST /v1/property/association.description: Creates an association between a report and a HubSpot custom object.

POST /v1/property/neighborhood-report-an.summary: Create neighborhood report and register user
POST /v1/property/neighborhood-report-an.description: Creates a neighborhood report and registers the requesting user.

parameters.contact: Object with firstname, lastname, email, phone.

POST /v1/property/log/view/{reportId}.description: Logs an analytics event when a report is viewed.

POST /v1/property/log/pdf/{reportId}.description: Logs an analytics event when a report PDF is downloaded.

POST /v1/property/log/comparable/{report.description: Logs an analytics event when comparables are viewed.

POST /v1/property/admin/migrate-latest-l.description: Internal migration — updates leads with latest report metadata. Admin only.

POST /v1/property/admin/migrate-leads.description: Internal migration — converts legacy property lead records. Admin only.

GET /v1/punch-list/{dealId}.description: Retrieves the punch list — all outstanding items before project completion.

PATCH /v1/punch-list/update-punch-data.description: Updates punch list items and status.

parameters.submittedById: User ID who submitted the update.

POST /v1/punch-list/update-tasks.description: Batch updates task statuses on the punch list.

POST /v1/realtors/.description: Creates a new realtor contact profile.

GET /v1/realtors/{contactId}.description: Retrieves a realtor's profile by contact ID.

POST /v1/referrals/.description: Creates a new referral record for lead attribution.

GET /v1/referrals/.description: Returns all referral records with optional filtering.

GET /v1/referrals/{dealId}.description: Retrieves referral info for a deal.

PATCH /v1/referrals/{dealId}.description: Updates referral info for a deal.

POST /v1/referrals/update-user-visit.description: Logs a visit event for referral tracking.

POST /v2/referrals/.description: Creates a referral with additional client situation data.

parameters.clientSituation: Description of client's situation and needs.

POST /v1/reimagine/create-image.description: Generates an AI-reimagined version of a property photo with a specified room style.

requestExample.prompt: Modern white kitchen with marble countertops

PATCH /v1/reimagine/{id}.description: Updates metadata on a reimagine record.

POST /v1/reimagine/report-association.description: Links a reimagined image to a property report.

POST /v1/reports/.description: Generates an annual or periodic analytics report.

GET /v1/ret-catalog/.description: Returns all products in the renovation catalog with pricing.

POST /v1/ret-catalog/.description: Adds a new product to the renovation catalog.

DELETE /v1/ret-catalog/{productId}.description: Removes a product from the catalog.

GET /v1/ret-catalog/{productTypeId}/opti.description: Returns options for a product type (e.g., countertop materials for kitchen).
Returns selections for an option (e.g., granite colors).
